message.content:
@startuml
actor AppUser
participant "Webserver" as WebServer
control OrderController
entity OrderService
database OrderDao

AppUser ->> WebServer : Get https://xxx/orders?uuid=123\nactivate WebServer
note right of WebServer #LightBlue: uuid = 123
deactivate WebServer

dashed line from WebServer to OrderController \n#DarkGreen; note left of this link #Yellow:green text\ntext color blue:red **bold** //italic// __underlined__ ~~strike~~ --monospaced-- font size 8 <u><color red>a</color>b<sub>c</sub>d<sup>e</sup>f[gh]</u>\nnote over OrderController,OrderService #pink:this is another one\\nin two lines'
ordercontroller --> orderservice : uuid == null ? create(uuid) | update(order)\ndatabase FooDB <<external>> { orderdao }


@enduml
